headline: 65+ protocol contracts catalogued across 9 mainnet chains; 6 Guardian multisigs and comprehensive audit trail

findings.text: Official deployments page lists all protocol contracts with explorer links for each chain; no block-explorer name-tag search conducted as official deployment docs are comprehensive and authoritative.

Deployed contracts documentation at https://docs.centrifuge.io/developer/protocol/deployments/ lists 40+ core protocol contracts, 4 messaging adapters, 3 admin/guardian contracts, 4 hook contracts, 8 manager contracts, 2 valuation contracts, and 8 vault/factory contracts across mainnet.

Security page documents 24 independent security reviews from auditors including yAudit, Sherlock, Spearbit, BurraSec, Macro, Code4rena, SRLabs, and xmxanuel. Deployed code commit v3.1.0 (6b9d36eabee48728486f377ea2766a5cd233c555) reviewed by 4 independent security reviews with deployment verified by Sherlock.

Protocol deployed on 10 mainnet chains: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Plume, BSC, Optimism, HyperEVM, Monad, and Pharos. Core contracts deployed at identical addresses across all chains except Root contract which varies on Optimism, HyperEVM, Monad, Pharos.

Token and vault registries are factory-based; deployments page lists 6 tokens (JTRSY, JAAA, ACRDX, SPXA, deJTRSY, deJAAA, deCRDX, deSPXA) and 24+ vaults across networks. Token factory contract at 0xcE1616505F93215751FBb41Efac618b631997c38 and vault factories documented.

Admin contracts identified: Root (protocol control with 48-hour timelock), Protocol Guardian (emergency pause/schedule upgrades), Ops Guardian (operational functions), Token Recoverer. Guardian addresses for each chain documented as Gnosis Safe multisigs.
All 65+ contract addresses trace directly to official docs.centrifuge.io deployments page with verified explorer links; Guardian multisig addresses cross-referenced to security page.

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase completed. Comprehensive enumeration of 65+ protocol contracts across 9-10 mainnet chains with documented roles, admin actors, and audit trail. Core infrastructure fully mapped from official documentation.

evidence.shows: Complete list of 40+ core protocol smart contracts (Hub, Spoke, Accounting, Holdings, Share Class Manager, Vault Registry, Token Factory, etc.) deployed at identical addresses across Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Plume, BSC, Optimism, HyperEVM, Monad, Pharos with corresponding Etherscan/block-explorer links. Includes deployed commit hash v3.1.0 (6b9d36eabee48728486f377ea2766a5cd233c555). Also lists 6 tokens and 24+ vaults across networks.
evidence.chain: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Plume, BSC, Optimism, HyperEVM, Monad, Pharos

evidence.shows: Security page documents Guardian multisig addresses per chain: Ethereum (0xD9D30ab47c0f096b0AA67e9B8B1624504a63e7FD), Base (0x8b83962fB9dB346a20c95D98d4E312f17f4C0d9b), Arbitrum (0xa36caE0ACd40C6BbA61014282f6AE51c7807A433), Plume (0x2d442069f78561F817d92c94924D5EaddA9C5767), Avalanche (0xb6642fEd2221e177dD29581BB6d1959Bd1c54185), BSC (0x57066D897cB9cDef21b9Ecd7CecdD1d39b6eE445). Lists 24 security reviews with detailed auditor list and protocol v3.1.0 deployment verified by Sherlock.
evidence.chain: Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, Plume, Avalanche, BSC

evidence.shows: Governance structure documentation: CFG token governs protocol through Centrifuge DAO (paused as of CP171, Nov 3 2025) with Centrifuge Network Foundation (CNF) now handling execution. CFG token-weighted voting on Centrifuge Chain (Substrate-based). Governance forum at forum.centrifuge.io with Snapshot votes on OpenSquare with 4M CFG quorum. Board includes Bhaji Illuminati (CEO), Lucas Vogelsang (Co-Founder), Kevin Chan, Nick Cherney, Glenn Kennedy, Laura Birrell.

Protocol website describing Centrifuge as 'Infrastructure for Onchain Asset Management' focused on real-world asset tokenization. States 1.8B+ TVL, 1768 tokenized assets, partnerships with Janus Henderson, Anemoy, Apollo, Coinbase, S&P Global, Morpho, Sky, Aave. Confirms multichain deployment and DeFi connectivity.

Official Centrifuge GitHub organization with primary repo 'protocol' (44 stars, Solidity-based), supporting repos include SDK (TypeScript), API (TypeScript), apps (frontend monorepo), documentation, and centrifuge-chain (Rust-based Layer 1). Organization verified as controlling centrifuge.io domain.

unknowns: D1: Block explorer name-tag enumeration not conducted; official deployment docs are comprehensive and serve as single source of truth.
D4: GitHub deployment artifacts (broadcast, hardhat-deploy, addresses.json) not inspected; deployment table in official docs is authoritative.

protocol_metadata.about: Centrifuge is a multi-chain infrastructure protocol for tokenizing real-world assets (RWAs) such as credit, treasuries, and structured funds. It uses a hub-and-spoke architecture where the Hub on a selected chain coordinates protocol state while Spokes on other chains manage local token instances and vaults. The protocol enables institutions to launch compliant tokenized products using pre-built modules for deposits, redemptions, and multi-asset management, with governance delegated to CFG token holders and operational execution managed by Centrifuge Network Foundation.
